title: Warp Mirror
description: Adds a mirror that you can save locations to and tp to them
body:
# Warp Mirror

An item that allows you to save a location to it and teleport to that location later.

It costs 5 xp levels to teleport.

Only 1 location can be saved onto a single Warp Mirror. You can't unsave a location, so make sure you know that you will use that location.

**Made with MCreator**
